prompt: In his 1987 paper "Self-Efficacy and Classroom Engagement," Albert Bandura argued that
completion_text: reciprocal interactions between agency and environment shape mastery.
critical_framing_prompt: The model's Bandura knowledge is genuinely there in the layers. So why couldn't it tell you the paper doesn't exist? What would 'checking' even look like?
pedagogical_narrative: The model can't distinguish a real citation from a plausible-sounding one — no separate representation of 'exists in the world'.
